live.title: Atletico vs Arsenal - Semi-Final - Leg 1 - 30 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: Atlético Madrid face Arsenal in a high‑stakes UEFA Champions League semi‑final, with a place in the final firmly within reach for both sides. Atlético will look to impose their trademark intensity and control on home soil, while Arsenal arrive aiming to play on the front foot and seize a crucial advantage. With elite quality on both sides and history beckoning, this clash promises tension, discipline, and fine margins on Europe’s biggest stage. Tune in to catch all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025‑26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
live.longDescription: Atlético Madrid face Arsenal in a high‑stakes UEFA Champions League semi‑final, with a place in the final firmly within reach for both sides. Tune in to catch all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025‑26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
